notes: Zapier splits Microsoft Graph across separate Outlook/Excel/SharePoint/Teams/OneDrive apps; OpenFn's msgraph adaptor calls a single Graph endpoint, so any of these resource types can be the source. Microsoft Graph supports subscriptions (push notifications) for many resources — those map to webhook patterns; everything else is cron polling against the Graph API.

triggers.name: New Outlook Email
triggers.description: Fires when a new message arrives in a mailbox folder.

triggers.name: New Excel Row
triggers.description: Fires when a new row is added to an Excel table on OneDrive/SharePoint.

triggers.name: New SharePoint File
triggers.description: Fires when a new file is added to a SharePoint library.

triggers.name: New Teams Message
triggers.description: Fires when a new message is posted to a channel.

triggers.name: New OneDrive File
triggers.description: Fires when a new file is added to OneDrive.
